titleStmt.title: SII 15.31: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 31. (B.K. No. 430 of 1926.) AMMINABHĀVI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying in front of Jaina Basti.
This is dated the 8th year of the king's reign, Krōdhana, Phālguṇa-amāvāsyā corresponding to 1146 A.D., March 14.

It states that on the occasion when the Tulāpurusha ceremony was performed by the king at Kōṭitīrtha on the Gautama-gaṅgā river, Mahāpradhāna, Paṭṭasāhaṇi, Kaḍitavergaḍe, Kannaḍa-Sandhivigrahi, Daṇḍanāyaka Bammaṇayya, having made the gifts of Gōsahasra, Prithvīdāna and Saptasāgara, restored the agrahāra of Ammayanabāvi and donated a piece of land to the god Mūlasthāna of the place. The Four Hundred Mahājanas of agrahāra Ammayanabāvi are praised. It also records gifts to the same deity made by the Mahājanas, Twelve Gāvuṇḍas and the Nakharas of the place. The epigraph is damaged and worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyā
malladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttamire [.] śrīmadbhūlōkamallakṣitipati
sthānadoḷu bhaṭṭanō¨rvvaṁ śrīmaccāḷukya
yadaṁ prēmātmaṁ tāsyaripunṛpagaja kaṇṭhīravaṁ nōḍutti¨rddu .
ḷ tatsabhāṁtarva[¨rttiyenisiṟda] sukavijanaṁgaḷella caḷukyānva yamaṁ sānvayamāgi tiḷiputta
śrīmadajjayyanenisi nega¨rttevetta piriya pe¨rmmāḍidēvana rājyābhivṛddhiyaṁ baṇṇisuva
vasaradoḷu śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvana bilagoṁḍada vīranārāyaṇadēvara kṣētra
mumaṁ taddha¨rmmaprabhāvamumaṁ pogaḷuttami¨rppavasaradoḷ . kritamati paṭṭasāhaṇi manō
diṁ jagadēkamallabhūpatige viśuddhabuddhi tiḷipalsamayādigaḷiṁde keṭṭudiṁnati śaya mā
yanabāviyanīgaḷe māḷpudeṁdu bhūnuta bammaṇacamūpati pe¨rmme yaneyde tāḷdidaṁ .
doḷammayanabāvi dharitriyoḷagrahāradoḷtiḷakadavōlvirājipudu bilagoṇḍada dēva
ḷamavi ddhamāytu samayādigaḷilnilisalke takkanaṁ kaḷipalevēḷkumeṁdu naḍa¨rkki gaḷeru
vanaṁ . paḍevaḷaranaṭṭi baraloḍanuḍalittammayanabāvi ninna taḍeyade pōpudu nī
ḍeya pramukha prasiddha nālnū¨rvvarumaṁ . nīna sama¨rtthanammayana bāvige ninnade rājatējame
mmaṇacamūpati kū¨rttuḍalikke rājyalakṣmīniḷayaṁ sarāgadi ltaḷedaṁ prabhu ru
tanāśritaprakarakaḷpakujaṁ guṇaratnabhūṣaṇaṁ . da¨rtthi prakarakkekaḷpa
kke du¨rddharatībrāṁtakanāśritapratatigāvārāśibandhupriyācara
tānenisidaṁ śrī rudradēvaṁ dharādharadhai¨ryyaṁ bhuvanastutaṁ parahitabyāpā
ridirāda du¨rjanaranāgaḷe śikṣise duṣṭakaṣṭaraṁ moneyoḷe kā
pudeṁdu rudradēvanadhikāralakṣmi verasāgaḷ bīḷkoḷisalke mājanamanaśē
baḷiyaṭṭi manōnurāgadiṁ . paramādaradiṁ nālnū¨rvaru maṁ baḷiyaṭṭi rudra
di¨rggoṁḍu pū¨rvvāparamaṁ tiḷipidanaśēṣanālnū¨rvarigaṁ .About eight letters are erased
sāhaṇi daṇḍanāthatiḷakaṁ vibudhāgraṇi bammadēvanuṁAbout eight letters are erased here.
cakrava¨rttiyaṟiyalparamēśvaradattiyāytenalkāhavadhīrana mmayana bā
mmaḍi pe¨rmmeyappinaṁ . teṟediṟalāṟadi¨rddavana vṛttige nū¨rvvaru vuḷḷa lekkamaṁ tiṟuvu
ṇnamiya pa¨rvvabiyaṁbirevātanaṁśamaneṟe tiḷidā sthaḷakke kaṁḍanāduda
ḷu poraṟiyalaśēṣamaṁ tiḷipi nū¨rvvaraśēṣa mi¨rdda patramaṁ . nē¨rvvaṭṭaśēṣami
ru voroḍeyamukhya gāvuṇḍa¨rppanni¨rvva¨rppaṁcamaṭhaṁ sakaḷō ¨rvvigiva¨rppiriyare
maṁṭapadoḷ . piriya sabhāmaṁṭapadoḷnerevudu nālnū¨rvarēkamata
maṁ tiḷidotteyanādaradiṁ biḍisuvadu pū¨rvigareṁdu nilal . vṛtta . biḍisuva
tada poṁgaḷa nimmaḍigeydu pū¨rvadiṁdoḍeyareni¨rppava¨rvviḍisi koḷvudu kā
ri poṇdada biḍasi¨rddava¨rmmaguḷ māṟuvudottayaniṭṭu koḷvudu roḍeya
yalu byavahārapathakramaṁgaḷaṁ . Avarivarennade samayabyava stheyaṁ mīṟi na
kondava¨rgge parihārameṁtenalavane valaṁ śvāna gaṟdabhaṁ caṇḍāḷaṁ vacana . Intī grāmasama
roḍeyapramukha nālnū¨rvva[¨r]mmahājanaṁgaḷuvācaṁdrā¨rkkatārannaḍe yisuttamire .
śrīmat pratāpacakrava¨rti jagadēkamallābhyudayava¨rṣada 8 neya krōdhana saṁvatsara
da phālguṇadamavāsye byatīpātaṁ kūḍida puṇyatithiyoḷ gautamagaṁgānadiya kōṭi
ttapu doḷ śrīmat pratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadēkamalladēvaru tuḷāpuruṣama nēṟe dha¨rmma
nāmaṁ kēḷuttami¨rppavasaradoḷ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēṇipati kaḍita ve¨rggaḍe kannaḍasaṁdhivigraReadsēnādhipati.
hi daṇḍanāyakaṁ bammaṇayyaṁgaḷ gōsahasraṁ prithvīdānaṁ saptasāgaraviṁtī mūṟuṁ
dānaṁgaḷaṁ māḍi śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara pādā¨rccaneyaṁ māḍi tanmuhū¨rta doḷ śrīma
dagrahāravammayanabāviyaṁ puna¨rbbharaṇaṁ māḍiyalliya svayaṁbhu śrīmū
polanaṁ sa¨rvvanamaśyaṁ sa¨rvvabādhāparihāramāgi paḍedu biṭṭarā . ka . manave¨rggaḍe sēnā
dhipati piriyadaṇḍanāyakanakhiḷāvanivani pogaḷe paṭṭasāhaṇiyena nega¨rddaṁ ba
sōmā¨rkkabyōmavahniśvasanajaḷadharātmā mū¨rtti prakāśa śrīmūlasthā
mahimegaṁgabhōgakke munnaṁ grāmakkānandadidaṁ tiḻuvēḻu
prītāṁtarātmaṁ sakaḷajananutaṁ bammadaṇḍādhināthaṁ . Ā dēvara pola
meṁteṁdoḍe paḍuvalu pūliya daśakaṁ baḍa galu pe¨rvvaṭṭebēlibasadiya
yī mṛḍana volakkiṁtidalte caturāghāṭaṁ . Iṁtī polanumādēvara kēriyumaṁ
ramāgi biṭṭar . śrīmadammayanabāvi samastagrāmadoḷti ḷakamippaṁ
tuśśataviprar śrīmahēśvarapādāṁbujabhriṁgar .
catuśśata viprariṁdaḷaṁkarisi gavuṁḍuva¨rgga pura va¨rggadinū¨rjjitamāgi
śritakōṭige kaḷpabhūjadaṁtire siriyaṁte vārinidhiyaṁte
. kaṁda . kamaḷōdbhavavaṁśōdbhavaramaḷa¨rśśiṣṭa vibudhadāridrya tamastimi
¨rnālnū¨rvarakhiḷavasudhātaḷadoḷ . svasti yamaniyama
nānuṣṭhāna parāyaṇa japasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ vihi
taruṁ . lōkavikhyātaruṁ yajana yājanādhya
rataruṁ . kṣīrasāgaraśayyāsanōrasthaḷa
prasiddha rājapūjitaruṁ . samasta lōka
ciṁtāmaṇigaḷanisi nega¨rttevetta śrīmanma
nā lnū¨rvva¨rmmahājanaṁgaḷuṁ panni¨rvvaggā vuṇḍu
dēvara naṁdādīvigegūroḍeya
dēvara pavitrārōhaṇakke nakharaṁgaḷaṁgaḍiya
meyyāgamaṁ kuḍuvar . Adhikārigaḷtavage naḍa
dīvigage biṭṭar [.] Arasugaḷu mūlegi
le talevoṟegayva ttaleyaṁ biṭṭar [.] grā
bīravaṇiga daṁgaḍiya navaṁ kuḍuva
rāgi nakharaṁgaḷ pratyayadalkoṭṭa gadyāṇavo
śśateśubhakṛtkāsanamuṁ lakṣmīsthiraśāsa
halasanmatta madhupana [Avi]kāra du
. śāsanamidāvudelliyaśāsanavārittarēke sa
ḷanaḷiguṁ . jinava¨rmmōjana kaṇḍaraṇe .
haṇa hāga
Digital edition of SII 15.31 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
